blurb: Apple Messages for Business enables organizations to communicate with customers through iMessage-based channels while maintaining verifiable business identity. Business identities are authenticated by Apple through a registration and verification process, with certified businesses displayed with a verified badge in the Messages interface. Customer interactions are protected by iMessage's end-to-end encryption with an added authentication layer for the business entity. The platform integrates with Apple Pay for secure in-conversation transactions and uses the Apple Identity Service to verify both customer device identity and the legitimacy of the business messaging endpoint.
